summary: Comprehensive testing of Payroll Correction - Weekoff = Sundays ONLY. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). The fix correctly separates Sunday and Holiday logic: Sundays contribute to weekoff_pay, Holidays do NOT. Active April 2026: weekoff_pay=4 (4 Sundays). Inactive Apr 14: weekoff_pay=2 (2 Sundays). Holidays show OH status with weekoff_value=0.

features_tested.active_employee_weekoff_pay_4_sundays_on: PASS - Active employee April 2026: weekoff_pay=4 (4 Sundays ONLY: 5,12,19,26)
features_tested.active_employee_holidays_oh_weekoff_0: PASS - Active employee: holidays (Apr 3, Apr 14) show OH status with weekoff_value=0
features_tested.active_employee_holidays_not_in_weekoff: PASS - Active employee: holidays NOT included in weekoff_pay
features_tested.active_employee_sundays_weekoff_1: PASS - Active employee: Sundays have weekoff_value=1
features_tested.holiday_not_worked_oh_weekoff_0_extra_0: PASS - Holiday not worked → status OH, weekoff_value=0, extra_value=0
features_tested.sunday_not_worked_wo_weekoff_1: PASS - Sunday not worked → status WO, weekoff_value=1
features_tested.future_sunday_su_weekoff_1: PASS - Future Sunday → status Su, weekoff_value=1
features_tested.future_holiday_h_weekoff_0: PASS - Future Holiday → status H, weekoff_value=0 (NO weekoff for holidays)
features_tested.working_days_excludes_sundays_and_holida: PASS - Working days correctly excludes both Sundays and holidays
features_tested.payable_formula_correct: PASS - Payable formula: (working_days - lop) + weekoff_pay + extra_pay still correct
features_tested.january_2026_weekoff_4_sundays_only: PASS - January 2026 (past month): weekoff_pay=4 (Sundays only, no holidays in weekoff)

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented in server.py: Sundays → weekoff_pay (Section 5A), Holidays → extra_pay only if worked (Section 5B)
Future holidays: weekoff_value = 0, status = 'H' (NO weekoff contribution)
Past Sundays not worked: status = 'WO', weekoff_value = 1
Past holidays not worked: status = 'OH', weekoff_value = 0, extra_value = 0
Inactive employees correctly stop at relieving_date: status = 'R', no weekoff counted
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test employees: TEST_NoBody_25a93648 (active), TEST_Deactivation_f98a8836 (inactive_date=2026-04-14), TEST_Relieved_05658888 (inactive_date=2026-04-16)

(2) TEST_Deactivation_f98a8836 (id=e93ef490-5c06-4c2c-8290-00537df17516) - Inactive (Apr 14), weekoff_pay=2 (Sundays 5,12 only). April 2026 holidays: Apr 3 (Good Friday), Apr 14 (Tamil New Year) - these show OH status with weekoff_value=0. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_payroll_sundays_only.py
